📖 **Wereanimal: The Game Manual**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Welcome to **Wereanimal**, an intense social deduction and night-action game! 🌙

Players are divided into secret factions, each armed with unique abilities. The game revolves around daytime debates, voting phases, and the complex interactions of deadly night abilities. 🎭

⚙️ **Core Mechanics**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🌙 **1. The Night Phase**
Players with active abilities secretly choose their targets. Actions are resolved sequentially based on their **Priority Level**. Some actions can kill 🩸, protect 🛡️, investigate 🔍, or even change a player's faction! 🦁

☀️ **2. The Day Phase**
All surviving players discuss and vote to lynch a suspected predator. A tie results in no one being lynched. ⚖️

🏆 **Win Conditions**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
🔹 **The Herd**: Wins when all members of the Apex faction are eliminated. 🎉
🔹 **The Apex**: Wins when their numbers equal or exceed the surviving members of The Herd. ☠️
🔹 **Solitaries**: Have their own unique win conditions (e.g., getting lynched, dominating the savanna). 🧩

```
📖 The Factions: 🐑 The Herd (Part 1 - Core)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
```

The innocent animals of the savanna. They must rely on their investigative and protective roles to find and eliminate the Apex! 🛡️

```
🐑 Common Sheep
A standard herd member with no special abilities. Their only weapon is their vote during the day. 🗳️
```

```
🦉 Wise Owl
The primary investigator. Can investigate one player each night to discover their true faction. 🔍
```

```
🐣 Fledgling Owl
An apprentice investigator. Can compare two players to see if they belong to the same faction. ⚖️
```

```
🐰 Rabbit Witch
A powerful spellcaster with two one-use potions: a Heal Potion 🧪 (cures poison and protects from death) and a Kill Potion ☠️ (bypasses protection to kill a target).
```

```
🦏 Rhino Hunter
A vengeful protector. If the Rhino is killed during the night, they will automatically retaliate and gore their attacker! 🩸
```

```
👻 Ghostly Dog
A loyal guardian. Even after being killed, the Ghostly Dog can protect one player from beyond the grave every night 🛡️. However, if they mistakenly protect an Apex member, they lose this power forever.
```

```
🐸 Crazy Chemist Toad
A chaotic gambler. Every other night, they visit a player to share a drink 🍻. One potion is poisonous 🧪, one is safe. There is a 50% chance the Chemist dies, and a 50% chance the target dies!
```

```
🐏 Cursed Sheep
A herd member with a dark secret. If they are attacked by the Apex, the curse awakens... Instead of dying, they transform into a King of Lions and join the Apex! 🌑🦁
```

```
🦡 Chunky Mongoose
A sturdy herd member completely immune to the Hypnotic Serpent's domination. If the Serpent tries to hypnotize them, the Mongoose bites the Serpent's head off in retaliation! 💥
```

```
📖 The Factions: 🐑 The Herd (Part 2 - Chaos & Specialists)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
```

These animals have highly specific, game-changing abilities. 🌪️

```
🦝 Sneaky Raccoon
A thief in the night! You can steal another player's role, turning them into a Common Sheep while you take their powers for yourself. 🎭
```

```
🦔 Quilled Porcupine
Armed and dangerous! You have a gun with 2 bullets. During the daytime discussion, you can publicly shoot and kill any player instantly! 🔫
```

```
🦛 Roaring Hippopotamus
The secret Mayor! During the day, you can loudly reveal your identity to everyone. Once revealed, your vote counts as TWO votes! 🗳️🗳️
```

```
🦭 Peaceful Manatee
The ultimate pacifist! Once per game during the day, you can cancel the lynch completely so nobody dies. This will reveal your identity to everyone. ☮️
```

```
🕊️ Matchmaking Dove
The romantic! On Night 1, you pick two players to become Lovers. If one dies, the other dies of a broken heart! The Lovers only win if they are the last two players alive. 💕
```

```
🦘 Blindfolded Kangaroo
The chaotic boxer! Once per game during the day, you can blindfold a random Apex member. Their night attacks will be completely scrambled and unpredictable! 😵
```

```
🦊 Two-Faced Jackal
The traitor in disguise! You pretend to be a normal Sheep and win with the Herd. BUT, if the very last Apex member dies, you instantly transform into a King of Lions to avenge them! Hide in plain sight! 🎭🦁
```

```
📖 The Factions: 🦁 The Apex (Predators)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
```

The ruthless predators trying to take over the savanna. They know who their fellow Apex members are and coordinate to kill the Herd! 🩸

```
🦁 King of Lions
The standard predator. Chooses one target to slaughter each night. 🥩
```

```
👑 Alpha Lion
The pack leader. Instead of killing, the Alpha bites a target and infects them, turning them into a King of Lions! 🦁 The Alpha also appears as an innocent member of "The Herd" to investigators. 🎭
```

```
🦅 Apex Vulture
The Apex's eyes in the sky. Can investigate players to find out their true faction, helping the Apex prioritize their targets. 👁️
```

```
🥷 Disguised Lion
A master of stealth. Kills like a normal predator, but appears completely innocent ("The Herd") when investigated by an Owl. 🌿
```

```
🐍 Venomous Snake
A silent killer. Bites a target and poisons them 🧪. The target won't die immediately, but will succumb to the venom after 2 nights unless cured by the Rabbit Witch.
```

```
📖 The Factions: 🧩 Solitaries (Third-Party)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
```

Players who play only for themselves. They win by achieving their own selfish, chaotic goals! 🃏

```
🐀 Playing Possum (Jester)
A trickster who wants to be lynched. If the herd votes to lynch the Possum during the day, the Possum instantly wins the game! 🎉
```

```
🐍 Hypnotic Serpent
A dangerous manipulator. Every night, the Serpent hypnotizes a player 🌀. If successful, that player becomes a Dominated Servant and joins the Solitaries faction.

🔹 The Serpent can force their servants to kill for them. 🗡️
🔹 If an investigator (like the Wise Owl) investigates the Serpent, they are killed instantly by its gaze! ☠️
🔹 If the Serpent dies, all of its Dominated Servants die immediately in a cascade effect. 💥
🔹 The Serpent wins if the Solitaries dominate the savanna. 👑
```

```
🐆 Lone Jaguar
A lone serial killer! Every night, you kill one person. You win only if you are the last animal standing. Apex cannot kill you—if they try, you kill them instead! 🔪
```

📖 **Engine Scenarios (Logic & Specs) - Part 1**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

The Wereanimal Resolution Engine handles extremely complex interactions. Here are 10 of the verified game scenarios: ⚙️

🎭 **1. Alpha Lion's Disguise**
The Alpha Lion hides their true nature, appearing as innocent Prey to the investigating Wise Owl. 🦉

🩸 **2. Alpha Lion's Bite**
The Alpha Lion bites a Common Sheep, infecting them and turning them into a King of Lions! 🦁

🦏 **3. Rhino's Revenge**
A King of Lions attacks the Rhino Hunter, but the Rhino gores the Lion in retaliation, killing them! ☠️

🛡️ **4. Witch's Protection**
A King of Lions attacks a Sheep, but the Rabbit Witch throws a Heal Potion to protect them! 🧪

☠️ **5. Witch's Poison**
The Rabbit Witch throws their Kill Potion at a target, bypassing all protections to kill them instantly. 💥

👁️ **6. The Serpent's Gaze**
The Hypnotic Serpent mesmerizes a Sheep. When the Wise Owl looks into the Serpent's eyes, the Owl dies instantly! 💀

⏳ **7. Slow Venom**
The Venomous Snake bites a Sheep. The venom slowly courses through their veins, killing them after 2 nights. 🧪

👻 **8. Loyal Beyond the Grave**
The Ghostly Dog is killed. From beyond the grave, its spirit protects a Sheep. 🛡️

🦅 **9. Eyes in the Sky**
The Apex Vulture accurately identifies which animals belong to the Herd, the Apex, or the Solitaries.

⚖️ **10. A Peaceful Day**
The herd tied the vote, so everyone survives the day to sleep another night. 🌙

📖 **Engine Scenarios (Logic & Specs) - Part 2**
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🧠 **11. Unbreakable Mind**
The Hypnotic Serpent tries to dominate a King of Lions, but the predator's mind is too strong. 🦁

💥 **12. The Serpent's Fall**
A Lion kills the Hypnotic Serpent. With the master dead, all Dominated Servants instantly collapse and die! ☠️

☠️ **13. Venom Succumb**
A Sheep is bitten by the Venomous Snake. With no Witch to save them, they perish two nights later. 🩸

🦁 **14. Predators Overwhelm**
The Lions kill enough animals that the Predators outnumber the Prey. The savanna is theirs! 👑

🎉 **15. The Herd Triumphs**
The herd successfully lynches the very last King of Lions. The savanna is safe at last! 🌿

💔 **16. Witch's Ultimate Betrayal**
The Rabbit Witch casts a protection spell... but then throws a Kill Potion at the same Sheep! The Kill Potion pierces the shield. 💀

💤 **17. A Quiet Spirit**
The Ghostly Dog is dead, but chooses to rest peacefully instead of protecting anyone tonight. 👻

🍻 **18. Toad's Deadly Game**
The Chemist Toad shares a drink. One drinks poison, the other is safe! Exactly one of them drops dead! 🎲

🌑 **19. The Curse Awakens**
A Lion bites the Cursed Sheep... the curse awakens! The Sheep transforms into a terrifying King of Lions! 🦁

🥷 **20. The Master of Disguise**
The Disguised Lion slaughters a Sheep. The Wise Owl investigates the Lion, but sees only a peaceful Prey! 🎭

🕰️ **21. An Endless Stalemate**
Three day and night cycles pass without a single animal dying. The game halts and declares a draw! ⚖️

👑 **22. The Serpent's Supremacy**
The Hypnotic Serpent dominates enough animals to make up half the living players, seizing control of the savanna! 🌀

🦡 **23. The Mongoose's Bite**
The Hypnotic Serpent attempts to dominate a Chunky Mongoose. The Mongoose resists the hypnosis and immediately bites the Serpent's head off! 💥

```
📖 All Game Endings
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
```

Here is a list of all possible ending states. 🏆

🐑 **The Herd Triumphs**
The Hypnotic Serpent is dead, all Lone Jaguars are dead, and **all** members of the Apex have been successfully eliminated from the savanna! 🎉🌿

🦁 **Apex Domination**
The Hypnotic Serpent is dead, all Lone Jaguars are dead, and the number of living Apex members is **greater than or equal** to the number of living Herd members. The predators feast! 🥩🩸

🐍 **Serpent's Supremacy**
The total number of living Hypnotic Serpents plus their Dominated Servants makes up **half or more** of the total living players. The savanna falls under mass hypnosis! 🌀👑

🃏 **The Possum's Prank**
The Playing Possum successfully tricks the Herd into voting for them during the Day Phase, resulting in an immediate trickster victory! 🎉🎭

💕 **Lovers' Victory**
Against all odds, the two Lovers linked by the Matchmaking Dove are the ONLY two players left alive at the end of the game. They betray their original factions for forbidden love! 💕

🐆 **Lone Jaguar Victory**
The Lone Jaguar successfully eliminates every other player and is the absolute last animal standing in the savanna! 🔪🏆

⚖️ **Draw (Stalemate)**
Three full day/night cycles have passed with zero deaths. To prevent an endless stalemate, the game automatically ends in a draw! 🕰️
